title: randia tetrandra
intro: Randia tetrandra, also known as the Thai jasmine or "Manjari" in Sanskrit, is a species of flowering plant in the family Rubiaceae. The plant has been found to have medicinal properties, particularly in the treatment of fever, cough, and respiratory issues, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Randia tetrandra include its ability to help alleviate symptoms of bronchitis, asthma, and other respiratory conditions, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and improve digestion. In traditional medicine, the plant is often prepared as a decoction or infusion, and in some cases, it is also used in the form of a paste or powder to be taken orally.
